title: Replace site logo with ONEDOT DIGITAL brand image

requirements.summary: Replace the current logo image in TopNav, HeroSection, and Footer with the newly generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png
acceptanceCriteria: The ONEDOT DIGITAL logo (dark navy 'ONEDOT' with blue circle accent on the 'O' in DOT, and grey 'DIGITAL' below) is visible in the top navigation bar.
The same logo appears in the HeroSection.
The same logo appears in the Footer.
No broken image placeholders or old logo references remain anywhere on the page.
The logo image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png.

file_operations.description: Update the logo image source to use the generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png. Replace any existing logo image or placeholder with an tag that references the new asset path. Ensure the logo has appropriate alt text ('ONEDOT DIGITAL') and sizing for the navigation bar.

Update the brand logo in the hero section to use the generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png. Replace any existing logo image or placeholder with an tag that references the new asset path. Ensure the logo has appropriate alt text ('ONEDOT DIGITAL') and sizing for the hero section.

Update the brand logo in the footer to use the generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png. Replace any existing logo image or placeholder with an tag that references the new asset path. Ensure the logo has appropriate alt text ('ONEDOT DIGITAL') and sizing for the footer.
